full_text:
Yu Song (Shumao) 虞松 (叔茂)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yu Song (虞松), styledShumao (叔茂). Advised Sima Shi on how to deal with invasions by Zhuge Ke and Jiang Wei. Yu Song was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
